title: Facebook Lead Forms webhook integration feasibility
reason: Need to verify Facebook API access requirements, webhook setup complexity, and data format for auto-creating lead records

title: Google Forms / Ads lead capture integration approach
reason: Multiple integration paths exist (Sheets API, Zapier, direct webhook). Need to evaluate simplest reliable approach for the chosen tech stack.

title: Email delivery service evaluation
reason: Need to select an email service that supports templates, variable substitution, and scheduled sends within budget constraints

title: COPPA applicability assessment for child data collection
reason: System collects child names and ages. COPPA applies to operators of websites or online services directed at children under 13, or that knowingly collect data from children. Need legal/compliance review to determine if parental-proxy data entry exempts the system.
